policies_consulted.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)
XX证券业务招待费管理办法
policies_consulted.effective_date: 2025 (exact date not specified in text, header indicates 2025 edition)

policies_consulted.title: XX证券授权管理办法
policies_consulted.relationship: Referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Article 5 for approval thresholds

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.reason: Repealed by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Article 14, effective 2025-01-01. Business dates 2025-10-25/26 are after repeal date.

per_person_limit.question: What are the per-person business entertainment limits for D1-level employees?
per_person_limit.finding: The per-person limit is 300 CNY, uniform across all employee levels. No level-specific differentiation exists.

clauses.text: 业务招待费用按参与人数核算,人均不得超过300元。
clauses.interpretation: Per-person cap is 300 CNY for all employees regardless of level (D1 included).

clauses.text: 业务招待单次活动费用不得超过5000元。
clauses.interpretation: Per-event cap is 5000 CNY (supplementary to per-person cap).

duplicate_reimbursement.question: What constitutes duplicate reimbursement?
duplicate_reimbursement.finding: Using the same invoice in multiple reimbursement forms constitutes duplicate reimbursement risk.

clauses.text: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的,应认定为重复报销风险。
clauses.interpretation: A single invoice may only be reimbursed once. If the same invoice appears in different reimbursement claims, it must be treated as a duplicate reimbursement risk. This applies to R004239 and R004240 if they reference the same invoice number.

split_reimbursement.question: What constitutes split reimbursement?
split_reimbursement.finding: Two distinct split-prohibition rules apply: (1) the general split rule under the reimbursement policy and (2) the entertainment-specific split rule. Both are relevant to R004239/R004240.

clauses.text: 不得将同一事项或同类事项拆分为多笔报销以规避审批权限。同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销,且合计金额达到《授权管理办法》附件二较高审批线的,应重点核查拆分规避审批。
clauses.interpretation: Split prohibition with two conditions: (a) absolute prohibition against splitting the same/similar matter to circumvent approval; (b) trigger for focus review when same employee + same expense type within 7 days AND combined amount reaches higher approval threshold per 03_authorization_management.md Annex 2. For R004239 + R004240: same employee (E0008), same expense type (business_entertainment), within 7 days (Oct 25-26), combined 1,085 CNY. The 'higher approval threshold' (AR-02 at 3,000 CNY) is NOT reached, so the focus-review trigger in condition (b) is not activated. However, condition (a) — the absolute prohibition — still applies if the two records are for the same customer visit or meeting.

clauses.text: 同一客户拜访或同一会议安排不得拆分为多个报销事项。
clauses.interpretation: Entertainment-specific absolute prohibition: the same customer visit or meeting arrangement must not be split into multiple reimbursement items — regardless of amounts. If R004239 and R004240 relate to the same customer visit or meeting, this clause is violated even if per-person and per-event limits are individually met.

approval_thresholds_for_split_analysis.application: R004239 (540 CNY) and R004240 (545 CNY) each individually fall in AR-01. Combined total 1,085 CNY also falls in AR-01, below the AR-02 threshold of 3,000 CNY referenced in Article 11.

special_approval_exemptions.question: Are there any special approval thresholds or exemptions for business entertainment?
special_approval_exemptions.finding: No special exemptions or thresholds exist specifically for business entertainment. Standard approval rules from 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md and 03_authorization_management.md apply.

clauses.text: 单笔费用报销的审批权限,不在本办法正文列示具体金额,统一按《XX证券授权管理办法》附件二执行。费用系统应按附件二自动派生审批角色。
clauses.interpretation: Approval authority for all expense types (including business entertainment) follows 03_authorization_management.md Annex 2 uniformly. No entertainment-specific override.

clauses.text: 无专项审批时,报销金额不得超过对应制度标准的1.0倍。
clauses.interpretation: Without special approval, the reimbursement amount must not exceed 1.0x the applicable policy standard. For business entertainment, the standards are: per-person ≤ 300 CNY (Article 3 of 06), per-event ≤ 5,000 CNY (Article 2 of 06).

clauses.text: 部门年度预算不足时不得继续报销。预算使用达到预算额度的1.0倍后,确需发生的费用应履行专项审批。
clauses.interpretation: Budget exhaustion triggers additional special approval requirement, applicable to all expense types including entertainment.

cross_policy_relationships.description: Expense approval thresholds are defined by reference in the authorization management policy annex.
Split-reimbursement focus-review trigger uses authorization management annex for 'higher approval threshold' definition.
Reimbursement amount must not exceed 1.0x the entertainment policy standards without special approval.
2025 edition explicitly repeals the 2022 edition effective 2025-01-01.

unresolved_items: Whether R004239 and R004240 use the same invoice number (needs data-layer verification for duplicate risk per Article 10 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md)
Whether R004239 and R004240 relate to the same customer visit/meeting (needs data-layer verification for split risk per Article 4 of 06_business_entertainment.md)
